text: soft side light, slate surface, f/2.8 — this might actually be the shot 👀
That foam is unreal. Did you see the beetroot one I sent from the Greenpoint shoot — the overhead angle?
Direct window light, 45° angle on that latte. Took three hours to get the foam right and it shows.
the Gage & Tollner oyster shot — side-lit on black slate. does the shadow feel too heavy or is Mateo just being dramatic again?
backlit steam on the broth, tight crop — somehow it reads like a perfume ad 😂 sending this one around the studio.
harsh backlight, white linen, total chaos on set — somehow it worked. great catch on the angle, Jesse.
